app_metadata.name: SentCom V6
app_metadata.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) / Technical Control Room Variant

rules: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings.
Use JetBrains Mono for all tickers, numbers, KPIs, the Thinking Pane, and code snippets.
Headings must use tight tracking (tracking-tight) to feel precise and engineered.

glass_elevation_motion.heartbeat_pulse: animate-pulse with text-cyan-400 or text-rose-500 depending on global machine state
glass_elevation_motion.state_transitions: Smooth crossfade for the global state pill (Cyan -> Amber -> Rose).

spacing_density.micro_layout: gap-1 to gap-3 for dense data clusters
spacing_density.padding: p-4 or p-6 inside glass panels to prevent text collision with borders

destinations.name: Cockpit
destinations.role: Default landing destination. Contains live trading, Scanner, Chart+Verdict, Pipeline, RiskRail.

destinations.name: Brain
destinations.role: Live AI intelligence, chat with the system, module scorecard, pre/post-market learning loops.

destinations.name: Journal
destinations.role: Complete trade trails, P&L lifecycle audit.

global_elements: Glossary Drawer: Slide-in from right edge, accessible universally for 'explains itself' reference.
navigation_model.flow_scan_to_trail: User interacts with Scanner (Cockpit) -> Clicks Symbol -> Instantly updates ChartVerdictPanel in center context -> Clicks 'View Trail' action -> Opens Journal Drawer overlay without navigating away from the Cockpit.

grid_zones.top_strip: TopStrip component spanning full width: System Health Pill (Cyan/Amber/Rose) + Heartbeat pulse + KPI Ribbon (equity, day P&L, open risk, throttle, RPC).
grid_zones.left_panel: Scanner (Scan -> Find) & Open Positions. Mission Control's pipeline view is folded natively into this vertical stack.
grid_zones.center_panel: ChartVerdictPanel. Dominant visual area. Contains symbol search, main technical chart, and Provenance Rings overlay.
grid_zones.right_panel: ThinkingPane (AI stream of consciousness, typewriter effect log) stacked above the RiskRail (daily-loss monitor).
grid_zones.bottom_action: V6ActionBar: Hidden or minimal in Calm (Cyan) state, slides up aggressively in Critical (Rose) state for emergency overrides.

drill_down_pattern.concept: Drawers and Inspectors over full-page navigations.
drill_down_pattern.implementation: Collapse the 90 legacy sub-components into a 3-tier depth system: 1. Glance (Cockpit), 2. Inspect (Slide-over Drawer), 3. Deep Dive (Dedicated tab like Journal/Brain).
drill_down_pattern.system_health: Consolidated from 20 scattered chips into ONE master System Health Drawer triggered by clicking the TopStrip Health Pill.
drill_down_pattern.unified_timeline: Single activity stream combining the previously overlapping streams, housed in the Brain tab.

explainability_pattern.provenance_rings: Concentric SVG radial overlays around trade decisions in the ChartVerdictPanel. Hovering ring segments reveals Edge Factors (TQS) explaining WHY a trade fired.
explainability_pattern.thinking_pane: Terminal-style scrolling log in JetBrains Mono showing real-time AI logic and internal monologue.
explainability_pattern.edge_and_learning_surface: Housed in the 'Brain' tab. Visual nodes showing disabled/enabled setups and EV-by-setup.
explainability_pattern.pnl_dlp: Always-on RiskRail (Daily-Loss Protection) and TopStrip KPI P&L, persistent across all 5 main destinations.

component_guidance.V6ShellPreview: Root 5-panel CSS grid layout. h-screen, overflow-hidden. Do not use generic centered card grids.
component_guidance.ChartVerdictPanel: Central focus. Integrates chart data with Provenance Rings. Include Symbol Search natively in its header.
component_guidance.ThinkingPane: Use monospace font exclusively. Add a subtle transparent-to-solid-dark gradient mask at the top to smoothly fade out old log text.
component_guidance.GlassHaloPane: Universal wrapper component for all primary panels. Apply the strict 'glass_panel' styling from the design system here.
component_guidance.RiskRail: Vertical or horizontal segmented bar. Green -> Yellow -> Red gradient specifically visualizing proximity to the Daily Loss Protection limit.
component_guidance.V6ActionBar: Fixed bottom placement. Glassmorphic but with a stark red/rose inner border when active. Contains critical actions like 'Halt Trading'.
component_guidance.TriggerProgress: Minimalist sparklines or segmented progress bars indicating setup triggers.
component_guidance.KpiRibbon: Horizontal flex container, dense data typography (JetBrains Mono), minimal spacing.
component_guidance.TopStrip: Flex container between layout. Logo left, KPI Ribbon center, System Health Pill + Heartbeat right.

testing_guidelines.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark mesh/texture. Apply heavy blur (blur-3xl) and low opacity (10-20%) via CSS to create the deep space atmospheric background behind the glass cockpit.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react @fontsource/chivo @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans @fontsource/jetbrains-mono recharts framer-motion
2. Build the V6ShellPreview first to establish the master 5-panel grid structure.
3. Implement the TopStrip and its single State Pill (cyan/amber/rose). The entire app's accent highlights and glow should subscribe to this single state.
4. DO NOT use standard Shadcn flat cards. Build custom GlassHaloPane wrappers using backdrop-blur and delicate 1px white/10 borders to respect the locked spec.
5. Keep the design extremely tight (Control Room density). Use textual hierarchy, color states, and borders—not vast empty padding—to separate data.
